title: Juliano is a front-end engineer.
subtitle: 9+ years building complex, scalable, high-performance web apps. I work mostly with React, Next.js, and TypeScript, and care the most about component architecture, design systems, accessibility, and client-side performance.
quote: "The only way to do great work is to love what you do."
contactDescription: Got a project in mind or just want to talk shop? Drop a line.
